Patch Set 12:

Hm, I do not see a rhel7 kernel config included. Is thid an omission?

Patch Set 12:

Oleg, I think config file is only needed for server build.  This patch is for client build alone as I understand it.

Patch Set 12:

more work will need to be done on the server side. I believe there's another patch for that. this is only on client and it built successfully.

Patch Set 12: Code-Review+2

Ok, I missed that this was a client only build
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 8061834dbe8a14d4fedf2203605e07eff562f7fe

parents.subject: LU-5322 socklnd: handle sk_ready_data change in 3.15+ kernels

commit.subject: LU-5022 build: enable building redhat 7 lustre client
commit.message:
LU-5022 build: enable building redhat 7 lustre client

Create series, target file, and lbuild-rhel7

Signed-off-by: Minh Diep <minh.diep@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ifb04bc0b5b64d1b533cab8f0bd23a02f754352fa
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/10708
Reviewed-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
